title: oxydectes warmingii
side_effects: Oxydectes warmingii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset in individuals who ingest its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can cause skin irritation, including redness and itchiness. In severe cases, improper handling of the plant can lead to more serious health issues, including respiratory problems and allergic reactions. Additionally, the plant's toxic properties can also exacerbate pre-existing conditions, such as kidney or liver disease.
